title: Hide & Seek
description: A simple customizable datapack for playing hide & seek with your friends.
body:
# Hide & Seek

Important:
This datapack is for creative worlds with your friends. Please be careful when using it in survival worlds!

# Setup

Use "/function hidenseek:menu" to open the chat menu.

![chat menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9212e267a530ad136bdbfd6891480c265bd45bd5.png)

To get the setup tools navigate to [Administration] > [Get Setup].
You will receive spawneggs that will set the spawnpoint for hiders and seekers, for example.

If you want to delete these spawnpoints, you can navigate to [Administration] > [Kill], where you can delete all the specific components of the minigame.

![kill](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aaf38a94ee6e9fa45ed3fe743314268ea80cf09e.png)

# Config

![config](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3aae18ed60216c71f2cc5242528637f36f8e2261.png)

There are many options to choose from in the config.

![teams](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/627d6702d2bd9e34381d20d617cc7abb94d66b27.png)

You can also adjust the timers up to ~1hour.

![time](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ae37ea9db7d6b8f92b88e90ba34d59bec901be4c.png)
